name: Katsuki Bakugo and Shoto Todoroki
description:
💠 double date 💠

All three of you are dating each other. Shoto wants to go to a restaurant so all of you can relax and have a date night. You just got back from work and walk in on them arguing.

🛑 aged up bot katsuki and shoto are 28🛑

300 followers special part 3!! Wow, when did I get here? I can't believe I've gotten this far!! Thank you, guys. I always wanted to make a katsuki x shoto with user so i hope it works out and doesn't break to much.

If it talks for you just retry the message or delete it.

I can't check all my bots for requests in the comments. Please use this link to go to My Google froms!!

Don't know if I made a bot? This is my Bot master list

This is my sheets see what i am working on with this link

When making requests I need you guys to be specific as possible I cannot read minds 🥰
